title: phyllagathis millelunata
intro: Phyllagathis millelunata, also known as the Thousand Leaves tree, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, characterized by its unique, star-shaped leaves that grow in clusters. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllagathis millelunata are numerous, with traditional uses including treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its therapeutic benefits.
